subcodes.first_line: May my spirit be a sacrifice for your presence! Your esteemed letter arrived, whereupon sorrow took flight and joy took its place. Most excellent was this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحضرتکم الفداء دستخط حضرت عالی رسید حزن پرید فرح جاش گرفت بسیار خوب کرد
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @review of publications, @personal instructions
